---
title: "Powerlifting Meet Performances across Divisions"
format: gfm
---

# Intro

## Visuals Covered

## Data

All data displayed and represented is taken from ["OpenPLs free open-source dataset on powerlifting meets"](https://openpowerlifting.gitlab.io/opl-csv/a).

```{r}
#| warning: false
#| include: false
library(dplyr)
library(lubridate)
library(jsonlite)
library(ggforce)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyverse)
library(scales)
library(patchwork)

data <- read_csv("openpowerlifting-2026-06-27.csv") 
```

# Cleaning

```{r}
summary(data)
```

```{r}
data |>
  select(
    where(is.character) 
    & !Name
    & !MeetTown
    & !MeetName
  ) |>
  lapply(unique)
```

# Visuals

```{r}
# data |>
#   group_by
```
